title: Prospecting Tools
description: This mod adds prospecting tools that assist you in finding ores, types of stone, moss, and more!
body:
Prospecting Tool

Currently there is only vanilla blocks that are detectable. I will add support for the following in due time:

  • Modern Industrialization
  • Create
  • Spectrum (Limited)
  • Regions Unexplored
  • Tech Reborn
  • Industrial Revolution
  • Mystical Agriculture

If you have any suggestions or issues, please make sure to let me know by opening an issue on the github page
